name: Roof gutter repair - north side
desc: Clear debris, patch seams, and re-secure downspouts on the north side of the sanctuary roof

name: Roof gutter repair - south side
desc: Clear debris, patch seams, and re-secure downspouts on the south side of the sanctuary roof

name: Fellowship hall interior paint
desc: Repaint all interior walls of the fellowship hall - two coats, color approved by committee at May meeting

name: Fellowship hall exterior paint
desc: Repaint exterior siding and trim on the fellowship hall building

name: Sanctuary AC service
desc: Annual HVAC inspection and filter replacement for all sanctuary AC units. Schedule with licensed contractor.

name: Parking lot striping
desc: Re-stripe all parking spaces, fire lanes, and handicap stalls in the main parking lot

name: Landscaping - oak trimming (front)
desc: Trim overhanging branches on the three oak trees along the front entrance. Coordinate with tree service.

name: Highway sign replacement
desc: Replace the aging highway marquee sign on the main road. Get three bids from sign companies.

name: November painting day prep
desc: Organize volunteer painting day on November 7, 2026. Purchase supplies, assign crews, notify congregation.

name: Pew repair - rows 5 through 8
desc: Sand, re-stain, and tighten hardware on pews in rows 5-8. Several boards loose and finish worn.

name: Baptistry caulk and reseal
desc: Remove old caulk, clean surface, apply new waterproof sealant around baptistry basin and steps

name: Parking lot pothole patch
desc: Fill and seal three large potholes near the rear entrance to the parking lot

name: Exterior light fixture replacement
desc: Replace four damaged exterior flood light fixtures on south and east walls with LED units

name: Nursery room repainting
desc: Repaint nursery walls in approved light yellow. Prep work includes removing old tape and patching holes.

name: Fellowship hall floor tile repair
desc: Replace cracked and missing floor tiles in the northeast corner of the fellowship hall

name: Window caulking - sanctuary
desc: Re-caulk all exterior window frames in the sanctuary to prevent water infiltration before rainy season

name: Groundskeeping - weed control
desc: Apply pre-emergent and spot treat weeds along all walkways, flower beds, and fence lines

name: Storage room cleanup and reorganization
desc: Clear out unused items, label shelving, and create inventory list for storage room behind sanctuary

name: Flagpole repair
desc: Replace frayed halyard and repair pulley on the main entrance flagpole

name: Bulletin board replacement - foyer
desc: Replace aging cork bulletin board in main foyer with new framed board. Calvin to update website photos after.

name: Smoke detector battery check - all buildings
desc: Test and replace batteries in all smoke detectors across sanctuary, fellowship hall, and education wing
